name: Vessel Core
summary: The Vessel Core is a sleek, compact 510-thread battery designed to deliver premium performance in an everyday form factor.
description: The Vessel Core is a sleek, compact 510-thread battery designed to deliver premium performance in an everyday form factor. The Vessel Core uses a three-LED indicator system to show remaining battery life. When all three LEDs illuminate, the device is fully charged. As power decreases, fewer LEDs remain lit, giving users a clear and intuitive way to monitor charge levels throughout the day. Pairs with standard 510 cartridges.
